creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Scenario:
- www/node6 is installed
- firefox being rebuilt using portmaster

Result:
- Below is the relevant portion of the portmaster build log
- relevant seems to be the line "FatalCheckError: NODEJS must point to node 8.11 or newer; 6.14.4 found."

Expected result:
- Building firefox should not depend on node.js at all
